details: Compound 38 N-Hydroxypiridinedione synthesis section, m.p. 102-104 °C (dec.) matches; DOI 10.3390/molecules29122942 present in paper.
Table 1 of rogers 2021 SAIL paper lists [TEA][C12E4c] with T Decomp. 234 °C; DOI 10.3390/molecules26134034 corresponds to the supplied PDF.
Table row for Pb(II) complex 10 shows '10 > 300 White ...' matching mp >300 °C; DOI 10.1007/s13738-021-02358-x present.
Compound 5c experimental: 'Yield 86%; mp 113-114 °C; Rf 0.63'; paper spelling 'dimetyl' corrected to 'dimethyl' is acceptable.
Compound 10e (indenoquinolinyl-phosphine oxide, 4-methoxybenzaldehyde-derived) mp 212-213 °C confirmed; DOI 10.1002/cmdc.202500751 present.
(Sp)-4a paracyclophane phosphine oxide '661 mg, 87% yield; white solid; M.p. 164-165 °C' confirmed; DOI 10.3390/molecules31030494 present.
Compound 10b 'Yellow crystals, 80%, 0.12 g. mp 236-237 °C' confirmed; DOI 10.3390/ph4081158 present.
Wei 2019 DSC text 'peaks located at 48.8, 85.8, and 128.9 °C correspond to phase transformation of AN' confirmed; DSC_peak property tag is acceptable; DOI present.
Cyclotriphosphazene compound 4a-I 'mp 218 °C' confirmed in synthesis section; DOI 10.1021/acsomega.5c11955 present.
Compound 20 (3-nitro-benzoquinoacridinone) '53%, yellow needles, m.p. 339 °C' confirmed; DOI 10.3390/60400300 present.
DMAP-Ugi product 4a major diastereomer 'm.p. 119 °C' confirmed; full IUPAC name including paper's 'pyridyn' typo preserved; DOI 10.3390/molecules16108815 present.
Table row '7a yellow 81 329-331 C21H20N2O2' for 2-aryl-6,7-dihydro-9,10-dimethoxy-4-iminobenzo[a]quinolizine series; 7a corresponds to aryl=Ph so 2-phenyl is correct; DOI 10.3390/70700540 present.
Title compound (N,N-bis(diphenylphosphinomethyl)-2-aminoethylphosphonic acid) experimental: '(34.6g), mp 146-148°C'; DOI 10.3390/60400390 present.
Compound 5e 'Solid cream crystals... Yield 0.96 g, 99.5%, M.P.: 119-121 °C' confirmed; DOI 10.3390/molecules31050844 present.
Compound 15 '8%; colorless needles (from chloroform-methanol 2/1); 159.5-160 °C' confirmed; DOI 10.3390/71100840 present.
Urea 4e 'Yield 0.247 g (98%), mp 128.9°C' confirmed; DOI 10.1134/S107042802211001X present.
Compound 4v 'Yellow solid; 1.8 g, 81 % yield; m.p. 278-279 °C (acetonitrile)' confirmed; DOI 10.1021/acs.joc.9b00711 present.
Table 2 row for R=H (iodylbenzene) 'H 8 86 236 expl. 235 expl. [23]' confirmed; DOI 10.3390/61100881 present.
ITR-TER cocrystal 'sharp endothermic peak at 198 °C ... indicated the melting of the new phase' confirmed; DOI 10.3390/pharmaceutics12080741 present.
Compound 6g 'Yield 86%; mp 112-113 °C; Rf 0.85' confirmed; paper spelling 'dimetyl' fix to 'dimethyl' acceptable.
Compound 13 (9-amino-4-hydrazino-...-triazin-8-carbonitrile) 'recrystallized from dioxane as white crystals; m.p. 262 °C' confirmed; DOI 10.3390/71000756 present.
Compound 4c 'Yellow solid; 2.08 g, 87 % yield; m.p. 253-254 °C (acetonitrile)' confirmed; DOI 10.1021/acs.joc.9b00711 present.
Compound 18 (full IUPAC name matches CSV exactly) 'm p 124-126 °C (lit ... m p 123-125 °C)' confirmed; DOI 10.3390/60900728 present.
Compound 20 'N-Isopropyl-1-[5-(5-nitrofuran-2-yl)-1,3,4-thiadiazol-2-yl]piperidine-4-carboxamide (20): Orange solid, mp 228 °C-230 °C' confirmed; DOI 10.1002/ardp.70227 present.

Hantzsch paper isolates compounds 1 and 6, then reports 'm.p. 206-208 °C'; NMR following (NH + H2 + single OH) matches 1,2-dihydropyridine (6); compound name string matches paper exactly; DOI 10.3390/60800683 present. Caveat: mp ambiguity between 1 and 6 in source text but NMR evidence and section context support assignment to 6.
